title: Administrator approval required for Microsoft Teams node
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with the Microsoft Teams node, the error 'Administrator approval required' is displayed, indicating that access to resources requires admin consent.
applies_when: User is part of an Azure Active Directory
not_this_if: User is an admin in Azure Active Directory
root_cause: The Microsoft Teams node requires administrator consent to access organizational resources. If the user is not an admin in Azure Active Directory, they cannot grant the necessary permissions for the application to function properly.
fix_steps: Confirm if you are an admin in your Azure Active Directory.
If not, contact your organization's IT team to approve the app usage.
agent_instruction: Check your admin status in Azure Active Directory and seek approval from IT if necessary.
